# Manhwa SFX fixtures

This folder is reserved for SFX benchmark notes and synthetic fixtures.

Committed samples must be one of:

- user-owned images;
- public-domain or open-license images with attribution recorded here;
- synthetic test images generated by tests;
- internal benchmark crops only when copyright permission is clear.

Do not commit copyrighted manhwa pages or crops without explicit permission. Use
`data/sfx_benchmarks/manhwa/` for local, untracked visual benchmarks.
